message:
🐛 On-demand preview check via GitHub Deployments API (#1224)

- Add CheckPreviewStatus endpoint that queries GitHub Deployments API
  to check if Netlify deploy preview is actually ready (not just exists)
- Remove automatic DB preview URL lookup from queue loading
- Replace ensureFeatureRequestExists with findFeatureRequest (lookup only)
- Webhook handlers no longer auto-create DB records for external issues
  (GitHub is the source of truth; DB only tracks console-submitted items)
- Add "Check Preview" button in queue UI for items with PR but no preview
- Preview URL only shown when deployment status is "success"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -618,6 +618,7 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Post("/feedback/requests/:id/feedback", feedback.SubmitFeedback)
 	api.Post("/feedback/requests/:id/close", feedback.CloseRequest)
 	api.Post("/feedback/requests/:id/request-update", feedback.RequestUpdate)
+	api.Get("/feedback/preview/:pr_number", feedback.CheckPreviewStatus)
 	api.Get("/notifications", feedback.GetNotifications)
 	api.Get("/notifications/unread-count", feedback.GetUnreadCount)
 	api.Post("/notifications/:id/read", feedback.MarkNotificationRead)
